text: The air is saturated with silence; I feel as if I've stumbled into an after-hours laboratory or workshop, where the absence of people creates an atmosphere both contemplative and eerie. Neon and artificial light bathe the space in cool hues, amplifying the sense of detachment from day-to-day reality. The words "R+D" on the wall invite thoughts of inquiry and experimentation, yet currently all is still. I feel like a spectator in a world caught between inspiration and inertia, my mind turning with quiet curiosity about what knowledge is born here in the quiet hours.
